sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115059" key="xrwma/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρωμᾰ´τ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n115059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pigment, paint, AP.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0587.tlg001:11:423" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.423</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hellad.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="II" id="n115059.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χρωματικός</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1401.tlg001:11:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
